---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What user problem does this solve? Please do NOT start with the solution. -->

## Who Benefits?
<!-- Which user persona is this for? e.g., Group moderators, item owners, new users -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe your proposed solution. Include Figma links if available. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why did you choose this one? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- How will we know this is done and working? List specific, testable conditions. -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Success Metrics
<!-- How do we measure impact? e.g., "Moderator approval rate increases", "Fewer support requests about pending joins" -->

## Out of Scope
<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this request? -->

## Figma / Design Reference
<!-- Link to designs if available -->
